title: Aures - Farmers Structures
description: New structures for Farmers Delight that teach the player how to use the mechanics of this mod and are just beautiful!
body:
Curseforge - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-structures

# 📖 About
■ Farmers Structures is an add-on for **Farmer's Delight** that adds many new structures that teach the player how to use the mechanics of this mod and are just beautiful!

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8bbcc9336559583a9ed15a9cc61b24e834541e8_0.webp)

# 📖 Main Features
- Many homes are perfect for a starter base or vacation spot. There's a bed and crafting table, as well as some food that needs to be cooked.
- 50+ unique structures with random generation (jigsaws-based).
- A simple style that fits well in a vanilla game. No huge buildings or unsightly materials.
- All structures will fit perfectly into the world. No sharp square platforms as far as vanilla mechanics allow.
- Carefully selected resources that won't upset the balance of the game.
- No Nether blocks in the overworld or other violations of vanilla progression.
- Thoughtful building content showing some Farmer's Delight mechanics and recipes. 
- Builds for compatibility with popular addons for Farmer's Delight.
- More information can be found in Images.
- Any structure can be found with the command _/locate structure farmers_structures:_

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d7c3827de12630c86aede61b9a01e51886741f5_0.webp)

# 📖 Installation
- It is required to install Farmer's Delight so that all structures are generated as intended. You can install this mod without Farmers Delight, but then the buildings will look very strange and empty :)
Write in the comments if some versions don't work. 
- Fully compatible with absolutely any other structure mods. 

# 📖 Special compatibility with other addons
■ If you install some mods by Nocube (1.20), you will also have additional structures in the world.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b86930d7f4a7dc80e8f6891ac7f15664eccbc7af_0.webp)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ef0a88283384614f95d7cc63895b78e90314ed_0.webp)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4476d26ca25faeeb9b7be8a381fa54978aa200e_0.webp)
